_doc: Launch original sectional — Simple & Compound Interest. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: Find the simple interest on ₹5000 at 8% per annum for 3 years.
questions.stem_hi: ₹5000 पर 8% वार्षिक दर से 3 वर्ष का simple interest ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Calculated one year's interest only: 5000×8/100=400, missing 3 years.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ 1 साल का interest निकाला: 5000×8/100=400; 3 years छूट गए।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Reported amount 5000+1200=6200 instead of interest.
options.trap_reason_hi: Interest की जगह amount 5000+1200=6200 दे दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Multiplied rate and time only: 8×3; principal was ignored.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ rate × time = 24 किया; principal ignore हुआ।

questions.explanation_concept_en: Simple interest charges the same interest on the original principal every year, so the formula is linear in P, R, and T. Final answer is ₹1200.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Simple interest में हर साल original principal पर same interest लगता है, इसलिए formula P, R, T में linear है। Final answer ₹1200 है।

questions.stem_en: At what annual rate will ₹6000 earn ₹1440 simple interest in 4 years?
questions.stem_hi: ₹6000 पर 4 वर्ष में ₹1440 simple interest पाने के लिए annual rate क्या होगी?

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Forgot to divide by time: 1440×100/6000=24%.

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Divided interest by years but did not convert against principal into a rate.
options.trap_reason_hi: Interest को years से divide किया पर principal के against rate नहीं निकाली।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used time in place of interest in the rate formula.
options.trap_reason_hi: Rate formula में interest की जगह time रख दिया।

questions.explanation_concept_en: Rearrange SI = PRT/100. The rate is the annual percentage of principal that produces the given interest over the stated time. Final answer is 6%.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: SI = PRT/100 को rearrange करें। Rate principal का annual percentage है जिससे given interest बनता है। Final answer 6% है।

questions.stem_en: Find the difference between compound interest and simple interest on ₹10000 at 10% for 2 years.
questions.stem_hi: ₹10000 पर 10% दर से 2 वर्ष के लिए CI और SI का difference ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Reported 2-year SI 10000×10×2/100=2000, not CI-SI difference.
options.trap_reason_hi: 2-year SI 2000 दे दिया, CI-SI difference नहीं।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Reported one year's interest 1000; the difference is interest on first year's interest.
options.trap_reason_hi: 1-year interest 1000 दे दिया। Difference पहले साल के interest पर interest है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Doubled the two-year difference. For 2 years, CI-SI difference is exactly P(r/100)².
options.trap_reason_hi: 2-year difference को double कर दिया। 2 years के लिए CI-SI = P(r/100)² होता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: For 2 years, CI-SI = P(r/100)² = 10000×(10/100)² = 100. Therefore, answer = ₹100.
questions.explanation_concept_en: In compound interest, the second year earns interest on the first year's interest. That extra interest over SI is P(r/100)^2 for 2 years. Final answer is ₹100.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: CI में दूसरे साल पहले साल के interest पर भी interest लगता है। यही SI से extra amount है। Final answer ₹100 है।

questions.stem_en: Find the compound amount on ₹4000 at 10% per annum for 2 years, compounded annually.
questions.stem_hi: ₹4000 पर 10% वार्षिक दर से 2 वर्ष का compound amount ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Reported CI as if it were simple interest, and also omitted principal from amount.
options.trap_reason_hi: Simple interest जैसा calculate किया और amount में principal भी नहीं जोड़ा।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used simple amount 4000+800; compounding requires multiplying by (1+r/100)^2.
options.trap_reason_hi: Simple amount 4800 लिया। Compounding में (1+r/100)^2 multiply होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Compounded for only 1 year: 4000×1.1. Time is 2 years.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ 1 साल compound किया। Time 2 years है।

questions.explanation_concept_en: Compound amount grows on the updated balance each year, so the annual multiplier is applied repeatedly for t years. Final answer is ₹4840.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Compound amount हर साल updated balance पर बढ़ता है, इसलिए annual multiplier t years तक repeat होता है। Final answer ₹4840 है।

options.trap_reason_hi: Simple interest जैसा calculate किया और amount में principal भी नहीं जोड़ा।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used simple amount 10000+1500; compounding requires multiplying by (1+r/100)^3.
options.trap_reason_hi: Simple amount 11500 लिया। Compounding में (1+r/100)^3 multiply होता है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Compounded for only 1 year: 10000×1.05. Time is 3 years.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ 1 साल compound किया। Time 3 years है।

questions.explanation_concept_en: Compound amount grows on the updated balance each year, so the annual multiplier is applied repeatedly for t years. Final answer is ₹11576.25.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Compound amount हर साल updated balance पर बढ़ता है, इसलिए annual multiplier t years तक repeat होता है। Final answer ₹11576.25 है।

questions.stem_en: Find the compound amount on ₹8000 at 10% per annum for 3 years, compounded annually.
questions.stem_hi: ₹8000 पर 10% वार्षिक दर से 3 वर्ष का compound amount ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Reported CI as if it were simple interest, and also omitted principal from amount.
options.trap_reason_hi: Simple interest जैसा calculate किया और amount में principal भी नहीं जोड़ा।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used simple amount 8000+2400; compounding requires multiplying by (1+r/100)^3.
options.trap_reason_hi: Simple amount 10400 लिया। Compounding में (1+r/100)^3 multiply होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Compounded for only 1 year: 8000×1.1. Time is 3 years.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ 1 साल compound किया। Time 3 years है।

questions.explanation_concept_en: Compound amount grows on the updated balance each year, so the annual multiplier is applied repeatedly for t years. Final answer is ₹10648.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Compound amount हर साल updated balance पर बढ़ता है, इसलिए annual multiplier t years तक repeat होता है। Final answer ₹10648 है।

questions.stem_en: ₹960 simple interest is earned at 8% per annum in 3 years. Find the principal.
questions.stem_hi: 8% वार्षिक दर पर 3 वर्ष में ₹960 simple interest मिला। Principal ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Forgot to divide by time 3; this gives the principal for one year only.
options.trap_reason_hi: Time 3 से divide नहीं किया; यह सिर्फ 1 year वाला principal देता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Multiplied interest by years instead of rearranging SI = PRT/100.
options.trap_reason_hi: SI = PRT/100 rearrange करने की जगह interest को years से multiply किया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Applied the SI formula forward to the interest amount itself instead of solving for principal.
options.trap_reason_hi: Principal निकालने की जगह interest amount पर ही SI formula लगा दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: From SI = PRT/100, P = SI×100/(R×T) = 960×100/(8×3) = 4000. Therefore, answer = ₹4000.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Principal is the base amount. When interest, rate, and time are known, reverse the simple-interest formula to isolate P. Final answer is ₹4000.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Principal base amount है। Interest, rate और time दिए हों तो SI formula reverse करके P निकालते हैं। Final answer ₹4000 है।
